artifacts.summary: Comprehensive analysis of Neovim and WezTerm configurations showing no automatic directory-changing behavior
Research report documenting OAuth2 token expiration as root cause and fix procedure
3-phase implementation plan for fixing Gmail OAuth2 authentication
Step C Python regex matches legacy format (- #N:) that never exists in TODO.md. Actual format is ### N. Title blocks. Fix: replace with block removal anchored on ^### {N}\. pattern.

active_projects.description: The archive-task.sh script moves task directories to archive/ and updates state.json (removing from active_projects, adding to completed_projects) but does NOT remove the corresponding task entry block from TODO.md. This leaves stale [COMPLETED] entries in TODO.md after /todo runs. Fix: add a sed/awk step to archive-task.sh that removes the full task entry block (from ### {N}. to the next --- or ### delimiter) from TODO.md after archiving. Also update the extension copy at .claude/extensions/core/scripts/archive-task.sh.
